text.title: GitHub Projects Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply GitHub Projects end-to-end. Each step names its input, action, output, and (where relevant) a decision-gate.

step.name: create-project
step.action: Create one Project per outcome; link target repos.

step.name: define-fields
step.action: Add ≤8 custom fields (Status, Iteration, Priority, Owner, Estimate, Risk, Theme, Done-by).

step.name: pick-axis
step.action: Pin primary axis (iteration or status); set default view.
